single_next_goal: Run one bounded no-fixture supervised live AFK session-trigger proof and report whether provider acceptance is observed from live terminal snapshot output with verified cleanup.
required_evidence: Trigger exit code and receipt field summary
Provider acceptance observed/unobserved classification from live snapshot text
Cleanup proof and post-run process comparison
Bounded provider metadata file summary without transcript bodies
Confirmation that async result routing was not started
pass_condition: provider_acceptance.status=provider_session_observed, concrete provider_session_id, cleanup.status=verified, status=completed, and no provider_acceptance_unobserved mismatch
stop_conditions: worktree is dirty before the run
the trigger requires fixtures, dry-run hooks, final session command spelling, or async result routing
provider transcript body inspection becomes necessary
human_notes: This is the live evidence gate after the accepted deterministic provider snapshot parser change.
Do not start async result routing yet.
